parameters.subject: Your CostaSol request — {{ $json.body.booking_code }}
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.body.customer_name }},

We have received your request for the {{ $json.body.car_label }} from {{ $json.body.dates_label }}.

The owner will be in touch personally to confirm within the hour.

Estimated total: {{ $json.body.estimated_total }}
Refundable deposit at pickup: {{ $json.body.deposit }}

Track your reservation →

— CostaSol Car Rent

parameters.subject: New inquiry — {{ $json.body.booking_code }} — {{ $json.body.car_label }}
parameters.message:
New inquiry received

Code: {{ $json.body.booking_code }}
Customer: {{ $json.body.customer_name }} ({{ $json.body.customer_email }})
Phone: {{ $json.body.customer_phone }}
Car: {{ $json.body.car_label }}
Dates: {{ $json.body.dates_label }}
Pickup: {{ $json.body.pickup_label }}
Total: {{ $json.body.estimated_total }}

{% if $json.body.customer_message %}

Message: {{ $json.body.customer_message }}

{% endif %}

View status page →

parameters.subject: Confirmed — {{ $json.body.car_label }} · {{ $json.body.dates_label }}
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.body.customer_name }},

Your reservation is confirmed.

Car: {{ $json.body.car_label }}
Dates: {{ $json.body.dates_label }}
Pickup: {{ $json.body.pickup_label }}
Estimated total: {{ $json.body.estimated_total }}
Refundable deposit at pickup: {{ $json.body.deposit }}

Please bring your driver's license and passport at pickup. Payment is in person.

View your booking →

— CostaSol Car Rent

Hi {{ $json.body.customer_name }}, this is CostaSol. Your request for the {{ $json.body.car_label }} ({{ $json.body.dates_label }}) is confirmed. Booking: {{ $json.body.booking_code }}. See details: {{ $json.body.status_page_url }}

nodes.name: WhatsApp (disabled — configure Business API)
nodes.notes: Enable this node and connect to your WhatsApp Business API provider (e.g. 360dialog, Twilio) to send WhatsApp confirmations.
